isEmail: {property} lazima iwe anwani sahihi ya barua pepe.
isEnum: {property} lazima iwe moja ya thamani zinazoruhusiwa.
minLength: {property} lazima iwe na herufi {constraint1} au zaidi.
maxLength: {property} lazima isiwe na herufi zaidi ya {constraint1}.
arrayMinSize: {property} lazima iwe na vipande {constraint1} au zaidi.
arrayMaxSize: {property} lazima isiwe na vipande zaidi ya {constraint1}.
